overview: Base Camp Functional Medicine provides personalized, holistic primary care through a functional medicine approach. The clinic offers comprehensive evaluation and treatment for hormonal health, chronic conditions, and optimization.
highlights: Bioidentical hormone replacement and hormone pellet placement
IV therapies and hyperbaric oxygen therapy
targetAudience: People seeking personalized, holistic primary care with a functional medicine approach, particularly those interested in hormonal optimization and bioidentical hormone therapies.
